County Superintendent of Schools
M. b. Watkins has been largely re-
sponsible for the most successful
teachers institute ever held in the
county. The attendance has in
creased 100 over last years record
and the work accomplished during
the session closing tonight has been
wonderful. Many exceedingly impor-
tant subjects have been discussed and
brought forward in a light that will
affect the public school system
throughout the county and state.
